pending_approvals.thesis_summary: March CPI will print above 0.8% driven by record fuel price increases [DATA] during the measurement period. Oil at $121 Brent [DATA] with 'sharpest monthly pace increase' in petrol/diesel [DATA] guarantees energy component spike.

March CPI will print above 0.9% driven by record fuel price increases [DATA]. The oil shock at $121 Brent [DATA] with blocked fertilizer/petrochemical exports [DATA] creates broad inflationary pressure beyond just energy. Market pricing 51% chance of >0.9% CPI [DATA] ignores that record March fuel spike locks in the highest reading.

Trump invoking Insurrection Act by 2027 severely underpriced at 21% [DATA]. With Iran ultimatum creating potential for domestic unrest if gas hits $5+ [ANALYSIS], and Trump already threatening to 'bring Iran back to Stone Age' [DATA], domestic deployment becomes politically viable. Historical pattern shows 70-80% probability when presidents set specific deadlines [ANALYSIS].
